no: JTweaks by jmerry. Bug fixes, rule tweaks, and QoL improvements for BGEE/BG2EE/EET. Multicat: most components PRE-TACTICAL, Antimagic Ray components POST-TACTICAL (must install after SCS Smarter Beholders).

conflicts.reason: SCS cn:6550 (Smarter Beholders) rewrites beholder AI including antimagic ray behavior. If JTweaks cn:181/182 is installed first, SCS overwrites those changes — JTweaks Antimagic component becomes ineffective. If using SCS Smarter Beholders, do not install JTweaks cn:181/182. JT cn:181/182 are subcomponents (pick one) — cn:181 makes rays ignore Spell Shield, cn:182 lets Spell Shield block one ray.
conflicts.source: SCS rewrites beholder AI scripts; JTweaks modifies antimagic ray spell; SCS overwrites if installed after, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Only JT cn:50 (NPC null kits) — safe due to kit==0 condition. JT cn:81-83 (Shapeshift) and cn:240 (Undead Hunter)
conflicts.myComps: #50 NPC null kits #81 #82 #83 Shapeshift corrections #240 Undead Hunter Turn Undead

conflicts.reason: JTweaks spell fixes overlap with Spell Revisions' spell overhaul
conflicts.myComps: #40 Enchant Weapon #70 Polymorph immunity #81 #82 #83 Shapeshift #140 True Sight #170 Celestial spells #181 #182 Antimagic #200 Elemental protection #360 Nature's Beauty

conflicts.reason: JT cn:81-83 (Shapeshift corrections) modify polymorph/shapeshift spell files also touched by TnT cn:42 (Spider form). JT cn:360 (Nature's Beauty cure) overlaps with TnT spell fixes. JT cn:370 (Imoen script fix) has no TnT overlap. None of the conflicting JT components (cn:81-83/360) or TnT components (cn:51/52/67/68) are typically selected together — check component-by-component if mixing.
conflicts.myComps: #81 #82 #83 Shapeshift corrections #360 Nature's Beauty blindness #370 Imoen script fix
conflicts.theirComps: #42 Spider form #46 True Sight #51 Project Image #52 Mislead #67 Grandmastery #68 Multiclass restrictions

conflicts.reason: Complementary. JT cn:370 fixes Imoen script bugs (XP sync, spell states). Imoen Forever adds new SoD content. Both EXTEND same scripts — safe stacking. Install JTweaks after Imoen Forever.
conflicts.myComps: #370 Fix Imoen's script #410 Imoen joins at level 1

conflicts.reason: HT's Expanded Shapeshifting overlaps with jtweaks' Shapeshift corrections
Both modify Nature's Beauty blindness duration. tb#tweaks sets 8 hours, jtweaks sets 11 years. Choose one
conflicts.myComps: #360 Nature's Beauty blindness can be cured

conflicts.reason: ToF shapeshift and subrace changes overlap with jtweaks corrections
fullplate cn:1 corrupts AC#WCOHD.ITM from 794 to 746 bytes via COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP on all ITM files. Breaks jtweaks item-patching components.

sum: 68 tweaks by jastey covering dialogue, gameplay, and convenience improvements. Wide variety of individually selectable changes.

co.no: Fixes Wilson's strength buff stacking indefinitely through repeated transformation. BG2EE/EET only.
Allows Vernus to be raised from the dead. Requires BG2EE/EET.
Fixes various oversights in Black Pits arena mode. BGEE/EET only.
Fixes Enchant Weapon spell to work when placed in contingencies and sequencers.

co.n: Joinable NPCs don't have null kits
co.no: Assigns 'Base Class' kit (0x40000000) to all joinable NPCs with null kit (kit=0). SOFT CONFLICT with Artisan's Kitpack: AK assigns specific kits to NPCs it overhauls, so those won't be touched by JTweaks. JTweaks catches remaining null-kit NPCs that AK didn't modify. Install order: JTweaks should install AFTER AK (already correct — JTweaks PRE-TACTICAL ord:270, AK KIT & CLASS ord:110). Safe to use together.
co.tp2n: Joinable NPCs don't have null kits

co.n: NPCs don't go in inaccessible locations
co.no: Prevents NPCs from teleporting to inaccessible map locations. BG2EE/EET only.
co.tp2n: NPCs don't go in inaccessible locations

co.no: Closes loopholes where polymorph forms grant unintended immunities.
Mage corrections incompatible with IWDification Expanded Polymorph Self and ToF/SCS shapeshift changes. Druid corrections incompatible with IWDification IWD shapeshifting
Shapeshift variant: only corrects druid wildshape forms.
Shapeshift variant: only corrects mage polymorph forms.

co.n: Wish Hardiness doesn't stack with itself
co.no: Prevents Wish-granted Hardiness from stacking with itself. BG2EE/EET only.
co.tp2n: Wish Hardiness doesn't stack with itself

co.n: Hold Person doesn't display multiple strings
co.no: Fixes Hold Person displaying duplicate 'Held' strings in the combat log.
co.tp2n: Hold Person doesn't display multiple strings

co.no: Barbarian Rage now blocks cosmetic portrait effects (blurred, etc.). BGEE only.
Prevents two opposing fire shields from creating infinite damage loops.
Standardizes Wand of Missiles to consistent damage across BG1/BG2. BGEE/EET only.

co.n: Inquisitor True Sight is consistent with other versions of the spell
co.no: Makes Inquisitor's innate True Sight match the priest spell version's behavior.
co.tp2n: Inquisitor True Sight is consistent with other versions of the spell

co.no: Temple healing services cure more conditions and work more reliably.
Fixes Bala's Axe dispel-on-hit to use a reasonable dispel level.

co.n: Celestials cast all of their spells at high levels
co.no: Celestials (Devas, Planetars) cast their full spell repertoire at appropriate high levels.
co.tp2n: Celestials cast all of their spells at high levels

co.no: Antimagic rays ignore Spell Shield entirely. Install AFTER SCS Smarter Beholders.

co.n: Spell Shield blocks one antimagic ray
co.no: If using SCS Smarter Beholders, install jtweaks AFTER SCS or the Beholder component will nullify this.
co.tp2n: Spell Shield blocks one antimagic ray

co.n: Death Ward protects against Aec'Letec's Death Gaze
co.no: Death Ward now protects against Aec'Letec's Death Gaze. BGEE/EET only.
co.tp2n: Death Ward protects against Aec'Letec's Death Gaze

co.no: Elemental protection spells (Prot Fire/Cold/etc.) add to existing resistance instead of setting it.
Vorpal weapons kill instantly without chunking, allowing Raise Dead.
Resurrection and Raise Dead can also heal living party members.

co.n: Loosen restrictions on what clones can do
co.no: Simulacrum and Project Image clones can use more abilities.
co.tp2n: Loosen restrictions on what clones can do

co.n: Undead Hunters are better at Turn Undead
co.no: Undead Hunters get improved Turn Undead progression matching their paladin focus.
co.tp2n: Undead Hunters are better at Turn Undead

co.no: Loosens class/alignment restrictions on NPC-specific items.

co.n: Green Slime poison can be cured
co.no: Green Slime poison can be cured with Slow Poison and similar spells.
co.tp2n: Green Slime poison can be cured

co.no: Increases Barrityl's Burden bag capacity.

co.n: Allies against Bodhi are better prepared for vampires
co.no: May overwrite other mods if installed after them
co.tp2n: Allies against Bodhi are better prepared for vampires

co.no: Adds a comedic Noober encounter game with escalating rewards for patience.
Incompatible with other AI script mods
Adds map notes for BG1 quest locations.
Makes all inns and taverns use consistent ambient music.
Randomizes which battle music track plays during encounters.

co.n: Potion effects don't stack with themselves
co.no: Prevents identical potion effects from stacking (e.g., two Potions of Heroism).
co.tp2n: Potion effects don't stack with themselves

co.no: Increases the size of random spawn groups in wilderness areas.

co.n: Nature's Beauty blindness can be cured
co.no: Alternative to tb#tweaks. tb changes duration to 8 hours, jtweaks to 11 years. Choose one
co.tp2n: Nature's Beauty blindness can be cured

co.no: Fixes Imoen's join/XP sync script in BGEE and SoD.

co.n: Prevent characters from acting uncontrollably when under Project Image
co.no: Prevents the real character from acting when Project Image clone is active.
co.tp2n: Prevent characters from acting uncontrollably when under Project Image

co.no: Some merchants (fences, shady dealers) ignore reputation for pricing.

co.n: Fire Breath Potions: Burning Hands targeting
co.scn: Alternate targeting for Potions of Fire Breath
co.no: Fire Breath Potions use Burning Hands targeting (cone from caster).
co.tp2n: Potions of Fire Breath use Burning Hands targeting

co.n: Fire Breath Potions: Breath Weapon targeting
co.scn: Alternate targeting for Potions of Fire Breath
co.no: Fire Breath Potions use Breath Weapon targeting (line from caster).
co.tp2n: Potions of Fire Breath use Breath Weapon targeting

co.n: Imoen always joins at level 1 outside Candlekeep
co.no: Imoen joins at level 1 when recruited outside Candlekeep.
co.tp2n: Imoen always joins at level 1 outside Candlekeep

co.no: Moot with Candlekeep Revisited
co.scn: Less reputation loss for killing Phandalyn

co.n: Phandalyn Rep Loss: 3 or innocent penalty (whichever is less)
co.scn: Less reputation loss for killing Phandalyn
co.no: Phandalyn rep loss: whichever is less between 3 and the innocent-murder penalty.
co.tp2n: Lose 3 rep or innocent penalty, whichever is less

co.n: Kondar works against more kinds of shapeshifters
co.no: Kondar longsword's anti-shapeshifter bonus works against more creature types.
co.tp2n: Kondar works against more kinds of shapeshifters

co.no: Random encounter difficulty scales with the game difficulty slider setting.
May cause issues with BG1 starting scene
Hexxat variant: Hexxat uses the Shadowdancer kit.
Compatibility with Candlekeep Revisited unclear
Drow MR overhaul may clash with Sword and Dagger, ToF subraces, or Tipun subraces

co.n: Drow MR Progression: No level-based change
Drow MR Progression: Slow (1/lvl, up to 30)
co.tp2n: Slow (1 per level, up to level 30)

co.n: Drow MR Progression: Fast (2/lvl, up to 20)
co.tp2n: Fast (2 per level, up to level 20)

co.n: Drow Sunlight: Dazzled (-2 THAC0, -2 AC vs missiles)
co.tp2n: Dazzled (-2 to hit, -2 AC versus missiles)

co.no: Changes Adoy's Belt effects to an alternate configuration.

co.n: Liia knows how to cast her spells
co.no: Fixes Liia Jannath's spellbook so she actually casts her memorized spells.
co.tp2n: Liia knows how to cast her spells

co.n: Allow clones of party members to use Advanced AI
co.no: Clone copies of party members (Simulacrum, etc.) can use Advanced AI scripts.
co.tp2n: Allow clones of party members to use Advanced AI

co.scn: Area names for the BGEE world map
co.no: BG1 area names use traditional descriptive names on the world map.

co.scn: Area names for the BGEE world map
co.no: BG1 area names use non-spoiler generic names on the world map.

co.n: Warrior and rogue HLAs can't be removed by spell-breakers
co.no: Warrior/rogue HLAs (Whirlwind, Assassination, etc.) cannot be stripped by spell-breakers.
co.tp2n: Warrior and rogue HLAs can't be removed by spell-breakers

co.n: Deactivate Spellhold picture monsters until their doors are opened
co.no: Spellhold painting monsters stay inactive until their doors are opened.
co.tp2n: Deactivate Spellhold picture monsters until their doors are opened

advisories.reason: Both modify racial features. Subrace drow changes may conflict with jtweaks drow MR overhaul
advisories.myComps: #463 Variable drow MR #465 #467 #469 #471 #472 #473 #474 #475 Drow MR options

advisories.reason: aTweaks expanded save tables and jtweaks save-related fixes may interact
Candlekeep XP boost may interact unexpectedly with Candlekeep Revisited's modified Candlekeep content
Both provide party AI improvements. May conflict if both installed
advisories.myComps: #300 Slightly improved party AI #500 Allow clones to use Advanced AI

advisories.reason: Mod-level note from install guide. Olvyn spell components may overlap with JTweaks spell fixes on shared files. Does NOT apply to cn:980/990 (ranger/paladin progression, the only Olvyn ). Neither detects the other.
advisories.myComps: #40 Enchant Weapon #140 True Sight #170 Celestial spells #200 Elemental protection
advisories.theirComps: Spell modification components (not cn:980/990 which are the only Olvyn in Ultimate preset)
